title: Vemmer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''''Vemmer '''''was the designation for a group of six [[MB-C1 medium transport|Mobquet medium transports]] in the service of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]].

==History==
Vemmer group was active within the Rebel Alliance shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. During the Alliance's battle with [[Hurrim]] pirates, all six ships from Vemmer were captured off-screen by the Hurrim and taken to the [[Hurrim Base]]. When the Rebel Alliance and [[Dunari]] launched an assault against the Base, Rebel ships from [[Storm Unit Group|Storm Unit]] boarded and regained control of all six vessels, allowing them to escape to safety as the Hurrim base was destroyed.

==Behind the scenes==
The capture of Vemmer and their presence at the Hurrim Base is left totally unexplained in the game, making their appearance seem somewhat random. Even when Vemmer is boarded by Rebel craft, at least two ships fail to fly off in an apparent glitch in the game.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
